heading: Energy efficiency in federally assisted housing
label: 16001 Energy efficiency in federally assisted housing
notes: Short TitleFor short title of title V of , which enacted this subchapter, as the “Indian Tribal Energy Development and Self-Determination Act of 2005”, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–58section 501 of Pub. L. 109–58section 15801 of this title

children.text: the use of energy-efficient technologies and innovations (including the procurement of energy-efficient refrigerators and other appliances);
the promotion of shared savings contracts; and
the use and implementation of such other similar technologies and innovations as the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development considers to be appropriate.
